flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Howard Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.0k → $9.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Howard Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Howard Community College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (10.5% → 12.3%).
